name: allure-deployer-action
description: Deploy Allure test reports to GitHub Pages with history and report aggregation

scripts.build: rm -rf ./dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && ncc build dist/index.js -o dist/main -e allure -e @allurereport/summary && ncc build dist/utilities/cleanup.js -o dist/cleanup && node scripts/patch-dist-package.js && cd dist/main && npm install allure@^3.3.1 --omit=dev --silent
